h6dd51f12g7aabg43f7g8d32g3c3dc0f5cd88: Get ready to fight or get out. Party's over.
hf3d26a0dg8807g4180ga689gbb15f43da2cd: That dwarf was still half-raw. Who ate it?
h67d221e0gad4cg436dgbc84g1a9d8d0c2682: 'Scuse me, ma'am - gotta concentrate on the meat.
h39b00c39g858bg4203g97e8gc2dd4ca18e5a: 'Scuse me, sir - gotta concentrate on the meat.
h2e7a5aacgae92g446fgac9eg5cea676e5525: Buzz off - gotta concentrate on the meat.
hda8613a5g508dg47c3g8437g748e0e5ae232: D'ya fancy a hunk of dwarf meat, under-dweller? He ain't ready yet.
hf3cdc15egd350g4f32gbc0cg1d300467d1fa: Smells delicious. Reminds me of my childhood.
hf28fb5a9gbbc0g4fc3ga80cg9a76ec296a6d: Figured you'd enjoy it. Bet you wish you'd been 'ere to skewer the ugly bastard.
h427a87d2g0c31g42ddg830dg181684cc0a7d: Prefer human meat myself. Juicier. Yer makin' me salivate just standin' there.
h5c633130gfc05g44d5g90d7g64488d39557b: One of his mates woz a tasty-lookin' long pig - but he ain't ready for the spit yet.
h64f291e5g5de7g46e6g9d6ag0428ce46bc85: Yer not allergic to dwarf-flesh or anything, are ya?
h1552704dg770bg418bgb7fdg71e1de494f24: That's just how dwarves is. Probably shoulda shaved him before cookin' him.
h8b74f6fcg1621g45f1gbf54ge292db180b2a: Where did you find a dwarf?
h480b1a46g8f26g4738gad2dga0e158bbfa97: He found us! Dunno wot he was doin' 'ere or where he came from.
he6d18c74gef94g490fg9965gccfcc690fda3: Lads inside are tryin' to get answers out of one of his mates.
ha4a943c6gcdaeg49a7gb10bg52bc7b766e8c: Scabby gang of tomb-robbers sniffin' around for loot. We put the fear of the Absolute in 'em.
hd1a73e79gdc2dg4a27g97b8gc0c7b5ef4678: Some managed to scarper, but the rest are all carved up... or wishin' they was.
hecab0faege98cg46d8gba71g285beca0d810: Was one of his 'mates' a druid?
hf3271333geabcg4590g80d4g2da672c7daeb: Nah. Druids are all beardy and woodsy, ain't they? This lot were a scabby gang of tomb-robbers.
h4df4d5b5gaee4g4615g8cecg206a57514f46: Had a big ol' warbear with 'em though. Took five of our meanest lashers to chain it up.
h7c1d847cg08f0g4ab5gbc56gae3396fee6f0: We'll beat the fight out of it, and make it one of our own.
h2d690896g4377g4fa9g8ab5g8ffe3f29bdc8: I'll handle the prisoner - when I ask questions, people tend to answer. Quickly.
he069a7d3g8dd0g4414g8a5fg77198cda18b3: I can get you answers. Where's the prisoner?
hbcdfbd08ga579g48a8gad3dgefea401c1d77: Thanks, ma'am. He'll probably spill his guts as soon as he claps eyes on ya!
hef505ac7g6dd9g4105g9d9egeb4d59f27ac4: Thanks, sir. He'll probably spill his guts as soon as he claps eyes on ya!
hd9d6f123g1111g4a27gbe90g16f1044927c5: He's inside. Keep to the right... an' follow the screams.
h42eb85d9g5eadg4879g8a48g4159b85527a4: Enjoy pokin' holes in people do ya?
h2633b69dg6517g4f54gbd4dg44e0cdc700f3: Step away from the pit. Now.
h68372848gc3b9g49d9g99f3g03e03b7d3bde: Ah, bugger off wiv yer attitude. He 'ad it comin' to 'im.
h7c7a7f51g99bdg4f88g9925gca87361cbd93: An' if you don't watch yer tongue, I'll chuck that on the fire an' all.
ha49a1b3dg2320g4609g8e7cg2e5613d1e3d8: Tha's the spirit! I ate goblin once. Me brother. Wouldn't recommend it. All grease and gristle.
h4747a474g201bg4419gbcf2ga094ae32ee5c: What you really want is a good bit of human meat, with all the trimmings.
h98ba1a23gd3fcg4e28ga74egebb4c4d1f9a4: One of this fella's mates woz a tasty-lookin' morsel, but he ain't ready for the spit yet.
h32a02650g8e98g4046gaf2dg530c715fdf47: Lads have got 'im inside for questionin'. Heh-heh-heh.
hebc766b8g636bg4a70g8dceg0c432c79eda2: Sorry, ma'am. Meat ain't ready yet - dwarves take an age to roast.
h75a33d6bgb3a4g4aaag8285gf0928c84ac69: Sorry, sir. Meat ain't ready yet - dwarves take an age to roast.
hc4f2b63dga6f4g4cf1gb312g4da30692e5b2: You peckish? Didn't figure dwarves for cannibals, but yer welcome to 'ave a bite when he's done.
hfe74ea2fg53eeg46a2gb521g3c754a89ebeb: Meat ain't ready yet - dwarves take an age to roast.
